name: built-to-last-successful-habits-of-visionary-companies
description: Jim Collins and Jerry I. Porras's Built to Last — the definitive research-based toolkit for building an enduring great company that thrives across generations.
useCase: Research-based framework for building visionary companies that endure across generations. Covers clock building, core ideology, BHAGs, cult-like cultures, evolutionary progress, home-grown management, and continuous self-improvement.
knownRisks: May oversimplify what makes companies succeed — context matters and not all findings apply to every industry or stage
Research conducted on US-based companies primarily — application in different cultural contexts requires adaptation
Some comparison companies (like Ames, Norton) no longer exist independently, making the contrast even starker but also limiting current relevance
